title: Shopify Catalog Deployment
description: Output schema for build-shopify-catalog (Phase 7B.1). Documents the result of deploying store_blueprint products and collections to Shopify via the Admin API.

status.description: Terminal status. COMPLETE = all actions succeeded. PARTIAL = some succeeded, some failed. FAILED = all actions failed or no actions succeeded.

shop_url.description: Shopify shop domain (without https://), e.g. my-store.myshopify.com

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the deployment summary was compiled

products_created.description: Number of new products successfully created (HTTP 201)

products_updated.description: Number of existing products successfully updated (HTTP 200)

collections_created.description: Number of new custom collections successfully created (HTTP 201)

collections_updated.description: Number of existing custom collections successfully updated (HTTP 200)

errors.description: List of API errors encountered during deployment. Non-fatal — partial success is possible.

message.description: Error message from Shopify or n8n

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings (e.g. noop sentinel, unexpected status codes)

blueprint_summary.description: Input summary from store_blueprint for cross-reference

safety_notes.description: Confirms safety guarantees applied during this deployment
